message:
test(spsc,approval): add 9 spsc ring buffer tests and 17 approval helper tests

spsc_ring_buffer.rs: Add 9 tests covering zero-capacity panic, try_recv on
empty, depth/capacity tracking, close lifecycle (producer-side, via drop),
try_send on closed, recv on closed+drained, send on closed, and multi-cycle
fill/drain. Expands from 4 to 13 tests.

approval.rs: Add 17 pure function tests for hash_allow_once_code determinism,
sha256_hex known value and format, generate_allow_once_code length/charset/
uniqueness, summary_for_input with/without optional fields, expiry_ms edge
cases (zero, overflow), now_ms positive, ApprovalScope::from_input field
mapping, ApprovalAuditContext default, fingerprint field sensitivity.
Expands from 12 to 29 tests.

Contributes to wa-1u90p.7.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
